master_resume.summary: Enthusiastic Junior Backend Developer with 1 year of experience building scalable REST APIs and microservices using Python and FastAPI. Passionate about clean code and developer experience.

experience.title: Backend Developer Intern
highlights: Built 15+ REST API endpoints for the core product using FastAPI, reducing response time by 30%
Implemented Redis caching layer that reduced database load by 40%
Wrote unit and integration tests achieving 85% code coverage
Deployed services using Docker on AWS EC2

projects.name: URL Shortener Service
projects.description: High-performance URL shortening service with analytics dashboard
highlights: Handles 10,000+ requests/second using async FastAPI and Redis
Built analytics dashboard with click tracking and geographic data
Containerized with Docker, deployed on AWS

projects.name: Expense Tracker API
projects.description: RESTful API for personal expense tracking with categorization and reports
highlights: Implemented JWT authentication and role-based access control
Celery tasks for async report generation and email notifications

sample_jobs.description:
We are looking for a Backend Engineer to join our Payments team. You will build scalable microservices handling millions of transactions daily.

Requirements:
- 1-3 years experience with Python
- Strong knowledge of FastAPI or Django
- Experience with PostgreSQL and Redis
- Understanding of REST APIs and microservices
- Docker/Kubernetes experience is a plus
- AWS knowledge preferred

Join our fully remote team! We're building developer tools used by 50,000+ developers.

Requirements:
- Python backend development
- React or Vue.js frontend
- PostgreSQL or MongoDB
- Git workflow
- Good communication skills
- Fresh graduates welcome
